name: API Team
description: Platform and developer-facing releases verified against Claude Platform release notes.
headline: Verified Claude Platform releases across {days} days.
subtitle: January 29 — April 8, 2026. Claude Platform release notes only.
footnote: Dates and links cross-checked on April 13, 2026 against official Claude Platform release notes and API documentation.

releases.title: Structured outputs GA
releases.whatChanged: API responses can follow a JSON schema you provide, with validation enforced server-side.
releases.description: Structured JSON outputs and strict tool-use schema validation became generally available on the Claude API.

prerequisites: JSON Schema for your output shape
steps: Define the `output_format` (or equivalent) with your JSON Schema in the request.
Send the user/tool messages as usual; parse the model output as validated JSON.
Handle schema errors from the API like other request validation failures.

releases.title: Compaction API beta
releases.description: Anthropic launched server-side compaction for managing long-running conversations.

releases.title: Data residency controls
releases.description: Developers gained control over where supported model inference runs.

releases.title: Web search tool GA
releases.description: The web search tool graduated from beta and no longer required a beta header.

releases.title: Programmatic tool calling GA
releases.description: Claude gained first-class support for code that can invoke tools programmatically inside tool-enabled flows.

releases.title: Automatic prompt caching for the Messages API
releases.description: Messages API caching gained automatic cache point movement as conversations grow.

releases.title: 1M token context window GA for Claude 4.6
releases.description: Claude Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6 gained a generally available 1M token context window.

releases.title: Thinking display control
releases.description: Extended thinking added the `display` field for summarized or omitted thinking output.

releases.title: Models API capability fields
releases.description: Models API responses started exposing capability metadata and token limits directly.

releases.title: Message Batches max_tokens raised to 300k
releases.description: The Message Batches API raised its `max_tokens` cap for Claude Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6.

releases.title: Claude Managed Agents public beta
releases.description: Managed Agents launched in public beta providing secure sandboxed execution, long-running sessions, scoped permissions, and end-to-end tracing at $0.08/runtime hour. All endpoints require the managed-agents-2026-04-01 beta header.

releases.title: ant CLI for the Claude API
releases.description: Anthropic shipped the ant CLI — a command-line client for the Claude API with native Claude Code integration and YAML-based versioning of API resources.
